title: Contact
description: Person with whom a business unit has a relationship, such as a customer, supplier, or colleague. Corresponds to the contact entity type in the Microsoft.Dynamics.CRM namespace.

fullname.description: Full name of the contact, combining first name, middle name, and last name.

middlename.description: Middle name or initial of the contact.

salutation.description: Salutation for correspondence with the contact.

suffix.description: Suffix used in the contact's name.

department.description: Department or business unit where the contact works.

emailaddress1.description: Primary email address for the contact.

emailaddress2.description: Secondary email address for the contact.

emailaddress3.description: Alternate email address for the contact.

telephone1.description: Main phone number for the contact.

telephone2.description: Second phone number for the contact.

telephone3.description: Third phone number for the contact.

mobilephone.description: Mobile phone number for the contact.

description.description: Additional information to describe the contact.

gendercode.description: Gender of the contact. 1 = Male, 2 = Female.

familystatuscode.description: Marital status of the contact. 1 = Single, 2 = Married, 3 = Divorced, 4 = Widowed.

spousesname.description: Name of the contact's spouse or partner.

numberofchildren.description: Number of children the contact has.

address1_name.description: Descriptive name for the primary address.

address1_line1.description: First line of the primary address.

address1_line2.description: Second line of the primary address.

address1_line3.description: Third line of the primary address.

address1_stateorprovince.description: State or province for the primary address.

address1_postalcode.description: ZIP code or postal code for the primary address.

address1_country.description: Country or region for the primary address.

address1_telephone1.description: Main phone number for the primary address.

address1_fax.description: Fax number for the primary address.

address1_latitude.description: Latitude value for the primary address.

address1_longitude.description: Longitude value for the primary address.

address2_name.description: Descriptive name for the secondary address.

address2_line1.description: First line of the secondary address.

address2_line2.description: Second line of the secondary address.

address2_line3.description: Third line of the secondary address.

address2_stateorprovince.description: State or province for the secondary address.

address2_postalcode.description: ZIP code or postal code for the secondary address.

address2_country.description: Country or region for the secondary address.

preferredcontactmethodcode.description: Preferred method of contact. 1 = Any, 2 = Email, 3 = Phone, 4 = Fax, 5 = Mail.

donotemail.description: Whether the contact allows direct email.

donotphone.description: Whether the contact allows phone calls.

donotpostalmail.description: Whether the contact allows direct mail.

donotbulkemail.description: Whether the contact allows bulk email through campaigns.

donotsendmm.description: Whether the contact accepts marketing materials.

creditonhold.description: Whether the credit for the contact is on hold.

statecode.description: Status of the contact. 0 = Active, 1 = Inactive. Inactive contacts are read-only.

statuscode.description: Status reason for the contact. 1 = Active, 2 = Inactive.

createdon.description: Date and time when the contact record was created.

modifiedon.description: Date and time when the contact record was last updated.

versionnumber.description: Version number of the contact record.

_parentcustomerid_value.description: Lookup property for the parent customer (account or contact) associated with this contact.

_ownerid_value.description: Lookup property for the user or team assigned to manage the record.

_transactioncurrencyid_value.description: Lookup property for the currency associated with the record.

yomifirstname.description: Phonetic spelling of the first name (Japanese).

yomilastname.description: Phonetic spelling of the last name (Japanese).

yomimiddlename.description: Phonetic spelling of the middle name (Japanese).

yomifullname.description: Phonetic spelling of the full name (Japanese).
